scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && pnpm migration:run && pnpm --parallel --filter @wa/worker --filter @wa/api run dev
scripts.type-check: node apps/api/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit --strict false && node apps/worker/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit --strict false && node packages/entities/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/entities/tsconfig.json --noEmit --strict false && node packages/storage/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/storage/tsconfig.json --noEmit --strict false
